basics.name: Samuel Situmeang
basics.summary: Lecturer in the Information Systems Study Program at Institut Teknologi Del (IT Del) with over nine years of professional experience. Coordinator of the Bebras Bureau at IT Del and Researcher at the IT Del Artificial Intelligence Research Center, specializing in database management, business analytics, and AI (LLMs and RAG).

work.summary: Professional educator and researcher mentoring students in Information Systems Projects (PSI) and internships.
Coordinating activities and computational thinking initiatives.

work.company: IT Del Artificial Intelligence Research Center
work.summary: Conducting research and development of AI-driven systems, including Large Language Models, RAG, and AI Agents.

publications.name: Automatic Coloring of Ulos Motif Using Large Language Model and Non-Dominated Sorting Differential Evolution Algorithm
publications.publisher: International Journal of Advances in Intelligent Informatics
publications.summary: A research paper focused on the automatic coloring of local cultural assets (Ulos motifs) utilizing LLMs and advanced sorting algorithms.

publications.name: Informatika Masa Depan: Prediksi, Tren, dan Inovasi
publications.summary: A co-authored book exploring future predictions, trends, and innovations in the field of informatics.

presentations.name: Community Service Program (PkM) Initial Assessment
presentations.description: Conducted an initial assessment for PkM with capstone project supervisees.

teaching.description: Capstone course supervising and mentoring students through their final Information Systems projects.

portfolio.name: Market Analysis for Master's Program in AI
portfolio.description: Drafting market analysis surveys and proposals for the planned Master's Program in Artificial Intelligence at IT Del.

portfolio.name: Google Data Analytics & Tableau Certifications
portfolio.description: Completed professional certificates in Google Data Analytics and Tableau Business Intelligence Analysis.
